captions: jump until the regular sinus rhythm  button
select item to the left of the irregular rhythm
launch the button next to irregular rhythm button
tap the item below 1 atrial fibrillation

["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "pressed": "not_pressed", "text": "
 • Look for the R – R interval ( the distance between every R – wave, best seen in lead II as tracing lead ).
 • If the distance is constant between the R – wave we called this “Regular Rhythm”.
 • If the rhythm was regular, the look for the presence of P – wave, if P – wave present then we called this  Sinus Rhythm.
 • If the distance between the R – waves are not constant we called this “Irregular Rhythm”.
 • If you find the rhythm is totally irregular and there is NO “ P – wave “ this is “Atrial Fibrillation” .
